_note: data/source/entries.src.json에서 tools/build-entries/build.py로 생성. 직접 편집하지 말 것.

senses.en: a round red or green fruit that grows on a tree

examples.en: I ate a red {{apple}} after lunch today.
examples.ko: 나는 오늘 점심 먹고 빨간 사과를 먹었어요.

examples.en: There are many {{apples}} on that tree.

senses.en: the long part of your body between your hand and your body

examples.en: He carried the box in his {{arms}}.
Raise your {{arm}} if you know the answer.

senses.en: a very young child that can not walk or talk

examples.en: The {{baby}} is sleeping in her bed.
A {{baby}} cries when it is hungry.

senses.en: a thing that you carry books or food in

examples.en: My school {{bag}} is very heavy today.
She put an apple in her {{bag}}.

senses.en: a round thing that you kick or catch when you play games

examples.en: The children kick the {{ball}} in the park.
He caught the {{ball}} with both hands.

senses.en: a long yellow fruit with soft white food inside

examples.en: My sister eats a {{banana}} every morning.
examples.ko: 우리 언니는 매일 아침 바나나를 하나 먹어요.

examples.en: The monkey took my yellow {{banana}}.

senses.en: a big heavy animal covered with thick brown hair

examples.en: A brown {{bear}} was fishing in the river.
examples.ko: 갈색 곰이 강에서 물고기를 잡고 있었어요.

examples.en: The {{bear}} sleeps all winter in a cave.

senses.en: the thing that you sleep on at night

examples.en: I go to {{bed}} at nine every night.
examples.ko: 나는 매일 밤 아홉 시에 자러 가요.

examples.en: The cat is sleeping on my {{bed}}.

senses.en: large in size

examples.en: They live in a {{big}} house.
An elephant is a very {{big}} animal.

senses.en: a thing with two wheels that you ride and move with your legs

examples.en: I ride my {{bike}} to the park.
He got a new {{bike}} for his birthday.

senses.en: a small animal that can fly high in the sky

examples.en: A little {{bird}} is singing in the tree.
The {{bird}} flew high up into the sky.

senses.en: having the colour of the night sky with no light

examples.en: A tiger has {{black}} lines on its body.
He has short {{black}} hair and brown eyes.

senses.en: having the colour of the sky on a clear day

examples.en: The sea looks very {{blue}} today.
He drew a big {{blue}} car.

senses.en: a thing that carries people on water

examples.en: We rode a small {{boat}} on the lake.
The {{boat}} moved slowly across the river.

senses.en: a set of many pages with words and pictures that you read

examples.en: I read a fun {{book}} before I sleep.
examples.ko: 나는 자기 전에 재미있는 책을 읽어요.

examples.en: She has many {{books}} on her desk.

senses.en: a container with flat sides for keeping things

examples.en: I put my toys in a big {{box}}.
There are ten {{boxes}} in the room.

senses.en: a young male child

examples.en: The {{boy}} is playing with his dog.
Two {{boys}} are running in the park.

senses.en: a food that people bake and eat with butter or jam

examples.en: I eat {{bread}} with butter for breakfast.
examples.ko: 나는 아침으로 버터를 바른 빵을 먹어요.

examples.en: My mother makes fresh {{bread}} every week.
examples.ko: 우리 엄마는 매주 갓 구운 빵을 만들어요.

senses.en: a boy who has the same mother and father as you

examples.en: My big {{brother}} helps me with homework.
He has two {{brothers}} and one sister.
examples.ko: 그는 남자 형제가 둘, 여자 형제가 하나 있어요.

senses.en: a very big thing that carries many people on roads

examples.en: I take the {{bus}} to school.
The {{bus}} stops in front of my house.

senses.en: a soft sweet food that people eat at a party

examples.en: We ate {{cake}} at her birthday party.
examples.ko: 우리는 그녀의 생일 파티에서 케이크를 먹었어요.

examples.en: My mother made a chocolate {{cake}}.

senses.en: a thing with four wheels that people ride in on roads

examples.en: My father drives a blue {{car}}.
We go to the sea by {{car}}.

senses.en: a small soft animal that people keep at home

examples.en: My {{cat}} likes to sleep on my bed.
examples.ko: 우리 고양이는 내 침대에서 자는 걸 좋아해요.

examples.en: The {{cat}} is playing with a small ball.
examples.ko: 고양이가 작은 공을 가지고 놀고 있어요.

senses.en: a thing with a back and four legs that one person sits on

examples.en: Please sit down on this {{chair}}.
There are four {{chairs}} around the table.
examples.ko: 식탁 둘레에 의자 네 개가 있어요.

senses.en: not dirty

examples.en: My hands are {{clean}} now after washing.
Please keep your room {{clean}} and nice.

senses.en: a thing on the wall that shows you the time

examples.en: The {{clock}} says it is three now.
examples.ko: 시계가 지금 세 시라고 알려 줘요.

examples.en: There is a big {{clock}} in our classroom.

senses.en: to move something so that it is not open

examples.en: Please {{close}} the window, it is cold.
He {{closed}} his book and went to sleep.

senses.en: a white or grey thing in the sky that brings rain

examples.en: Dark {{clouds}} covered the whole sky.
That white {{cloud}} looks like a rabbit.

senses.en: warm clothes that you wear over other clothes when it is cold

examples.en: Wear your {{coat}}, it is cold outside.
He hung his {{coat}} by the door.

senses.en: not warm, like ice or snow in winter

examples.en: The water in the river is very {{cold}}.
I wear a warm coat on {{cold}} days.
examples.ko: 나는 추운 날에는 따뜻한 외투를 입어요.

senses.en: a big farm animal that gives us milk

examples.en: The {{cow}} is eating grass in the field.
We get milk from a {{cow}}.

senses.en: a small round container that you drink from

examples.en: I drink tea from a red {{cup}}.
Please wash the {{cups}} after dinner.

senses.en: the time when there is light from the sun

examples.en: We play outside during the {{day}}.
It was a warm and sunny {{day}}.

senses.en: not clean

examples.en: My shoes are {{dirty}} after the rain.
examples.ko: 비가 온 뒤 내 신발이 더러워요.

examples.en: Do not touch the food with {{dirty}} hands.

senses.en: a person who helps sick people get well

examples.en: The {{doctor}} helped me when I was sick.
examples.ko: 내가 아팠을 때 의사 선생님이 도와줬어요.

examples.en: My aunt is a {{doctor}} at a big hospital.

senses.en: an animal that many people keep at home and love

examples.en: Our {{dog}} runs very fast in the park.
examples.ko: 우리 강아지는 공원에서 아주 빨리 달려요.

examples.en: The {{dog}} wants to play with me now.
examples.ko: 강아지가 지금 나랑 놀고 싶어 해요.

senses.en: the part of a room that you open to go inside

examples.en: Please close the {{door}} when you leave.
The {{door}} is open, so come inside.

senses.en: a piece of clothes that a girl wears over her body

examples.en: She wore a blue {{dress}} to the party.
examples.ko: 그녀는 파티에 파란 원피스를 입고 갔어요.

examples.en: This {{dress}} is too long for me.

senses.en: to take water or milk into your mouth and make it go down

examples.en: I {{drink}} water when I am thirsty.
He {{drank}} a glass of cold milk.
examples.ko: 그는 차가운 우유 한 잔을 마셨어요.

senses.en: a bird that swims on water and has a wide mouth

examples.en: A {{duck}} is swimming on the lake.
We fed the {{ducks}} some bread.

senses.en: the part of your body that you hear with

examples.en: A rabbit has two long {{ears}}.
examples.ko: 토끼는 긴 귀가 두 개 있어요.

examples.en: I heard the music with my {{ears}}.

senses.en: to put food in your mouth and make it go down

examples.en: We {{eat}} dinner together every night.
examples.ko: 우리는 매일 밤 함께 저녁을 먹어요.

examples.en: She {{ate}} all of her rice.

senses.en: a round white thing that a bird makes its babies in

examples.en: I eat one {{egg}} for breakfast.
The bird sits on its {{eggs}} all day.
examples.ko: 새가 하루 종일 알 위에 앉아 있어요.

senses.en: the part of your face that you use to see

examples.en: Close your {{eyes}} and go to sleep.
The baby has big brown {{eyes}}.
examples.ko: 그 아기는 크고 갈색인 눈을 가졌어요.

senses.en: the front part of your head with your eyes and mouth

examples.en: Please wash your {{face}} in the morning.
She had a big smile on her {{face}}.

senses.en: moving very quickly

examples.en: A {{fast}} horse won the race.
This is a very {{fast}} train.

senses.en: a man who has a child

examples.en: My {{father}} drives me to school.
His {{father}} reads him a story at night.
examples.ko: 그의 아버지는 밤에 그에게 이야기를 읽어 줘요.

senses.en: the hot bright thing that burns and gives heat

examples.en: We sat near the warm {{fire}}.
You must be careful with {{fire}}.

senses.en: an animal that lives in water and can swim

examples.en: Many {{fish}} live in this cold river.
examples.ko: 이 차가운 강에는 물고기가 많이 살아요.

examples.en: We saw a big {{fish}} in the water.

senses.en: the pretty part of a plant with a nice smell

examples.en: She gave me a pretty red {{flower}}.
examples.ko: 그녀가 나에게 예쁜 빨간 꽃을 줬어요.

examples.en: Many {{flowers}} grow in our garden.

senses.en: the part of your body that you stand on

examples.en: My left {{foot}} hurts a little.
She has small {{feet}} for her age.

senses.en: someone that you know well and like very much

examples.en: My best {{friend}} lives next to me.
examples.ko: 내 가장 친한 친구는 내 옆집에 살아요.

examples.en: I play games with my {{friends}} after school.
examples.ko: 나는 방과 후에 친구들이랑 게임을 해요.

senses.en: a fun thing that you play with rules

examples.en: We played a fun {{game}} at the party.
This {{game}} is easy to learn.

senses.en: a young female child

examples.en: The {{girl}} is drawing a picture.
A {{girl}} in my class sits next to me.
examples.ko: 우리 반 여자아이가 내 옆에 앉아요.

senses.en: to put something in someone's hand to keep

examples.en: Please {{give}} this letter to your teacher.
She {{gave}} me a nice birthday present.
examples.ko: 그녀는 나에게 멋진 생일 선물을 줬어요.

senses.en: having the colour of grass and leaves

examples.en: The leaves turn {{green}} in spring.
She has a {{green}} school bag.

senses.en: the soft thin things that grow on your head

examples.en: She has long black {{hair}} and big eyes.
Please brush your {{hair}} before school.

senses.en: the part of your body at the end of your arm

examples.en: Please wash your {{hands}} before you eat.
She holds a pen in her right {{hand}}.

senses.en: feeling good because something nice happened

examples.en: I am so {{happy}} to see you!
She looked {{happy}} with her new bike.
examples.ko: 그녀는 새 자전거를 받고 기뻐 보였어요.

senses.en: a thing that you wear on your head

examples.en: I wear a {{hat}} on sunny days.
Her red {{hat}} is very pretty.

senses.en: the top part of your body where your face is

examples.en: I wear a hat on my {{head}}.
She turned her {{head}} to look at me.

senses.en: to do something good for someone who needs it

examples.en: I always {{help}} my mother at home.
Can you {{help}} me with this box?
examples.ko: 이 상자 옮기는 것 좀 도와줄래요?

senses.en: a large strong animal that people ride

examples.en: The {{horse}} runs fast across the field.
She likes to ride a brown {{horse}}.
examples.ko: 그녀는 갈색 말을 타는 걸 좋아해요.

senses.en: a place where doctors help sick people get well

examples.en: The doctor works at a big {{hospital}}.
We went to the {{hospital}} to see my aunt.

senses.en: very warm, like fire or the summer sun

examples.en: The soup is too {{hot}} to eat now.
examples.ko: 국이 너무 뜨거워서 지금 못 먹어요.

examples.en: Summer days are very {{hot}} here.

senses.en: a building where people live

examples.en: They live in a big {{house}}.
My {{house}} is close to the school.

senses.en: to push yourself up into the air with your legs

examples.en: The children {{jump}} over the rope.
My dog can {{jump}} very high.
examples.ko: 우리 개는 아주 높이 뛸 수 있어요.

senses.en: a small metal thing that you use to open a door

examples.en: I lost the {{key}} to my house.
She keeps her {{keys}} in her bag.

senses.en: the long part of your body that you walk with

examples.en: A dog runs on four {{legs}}.
My {{legs}} are tired after the long walk.

senses.en: a big wild animal that is called the king of animals

examples.en: The {{lion}} has a loud and strong voice.
We saw a {{lion}} sleeping at the zoo.
examples.ko: 우리는 동물원에서 자고 있는 사자를 봤어요.

senses.en: far from one end to the other end

examples.en: An elephant has a {{long}} nose.
We walked a {{long}} way to the river.

senses.en: to turn your eyes to see something

examples.en: {{Look}} at all the beautiful flowers!
She {{looked}} up at the night sky.

senses.en: the white drink that comes from a cow

examples.en: I drink a glass of {{milk}} every morning.
examples.ko: 나는 매일 아침 우유 한 잔을 마셔요.

examples.en: The baby drinks warm {{milk}} before bed.
examples.ko: 아기는 자기 전에 따뜻한 우유를 마셔요.

senses.note: 셀 수 없는 명사예요. 'a milk'가 아니라 'a glass of milk'라고 해요.

senses.en: an animal that climbs trees and has a long tail

examples.en: The {{monkey}} ate a yellow banana.
A {{monkey}} can climb a tree very fast.
examples.ko: 원숭이는 나무를 아주 빨리 올라갈 수 있어요.

senses.en: the round white thing that you see in the night sky

examples.en: The {{moon}} was very bright last night.
We can see the {{moon}} from our window.
examples.ko: 우리는 창문으로 달을 볼 수 있어요.

senses.en: the early part of the day after you wake up

examples.en: I eat bread in the {{morning}}.
Every {{morning}} she walks to school.

senses.en: a woman who has a child

examples.en: My {{mother}} makes dinner for us.
examples.ko: 우리 엄마는 우리에게 저녁을 만들어 줘요.

examples.en: Her {{mother}} works at a hospital.

senses.en: a very high place made of rock and ground

examples.en: We climbed a high {{mountain}} last week.
Snow covers the {{mountain}} in winter.

senses.en: a very small animal with a long thin tail

examples.en: A small {{mouse}} ran under the bed.
The cat wants to catch the {{mouse}}.

senses.en: the part of your face that you use to eat and speak

examples.en: Open your {{mouth}} and say ah.
Do not talk with food in your {{mouth}}.

senses.en: the word that people use to call you

examples.en: My {{name}} is on my school bag.
Please write your {{name}} at the top.

senses.en: made a short time ago, not old

examples.en: I got a {{new}} bike for my birthday.
She is wearing a {{new}} dress today.

senses.en: the dark time when the sun is not in the sky

examples.en: The stars come out at {{night}}.
I read a book every {{night}}.

senses.en: the part of your face that you use to smell

examples.en: An elephant has a very long {{nose}}.
I smell the flowers with my {{nose}}.

senses.en: made a long time ago, or having lived many years

examples.en: This is a very {{old}} book from my grandfather.
examples.ko: 이건 우리 할아버지의 아주 오래된 책이에요.

examples.en: My grandmother is quite {{old}} now.
examples.ko: 우리 할머니는 이제 꽤 나이가 드셨어요.

senses.en: to move something so that it is not closed

examples.en: Please {{open}} the door for me.
She {{opened}} the box and looked inside.

senses.en: a round sweet fruit with a thick skin

examples.en: I drink {{orange}} juice for breakfast.
She gave me a sweet {{orange}}.

senses.en: the thin flat thing that you write or draw on

examples.en: Please write your name on the {{paper}}.
She drew a cat on white {{paper}}.

senses.en: a large open place with grass and trees where people play

examples.en: We play in the {{park}} after school.
There are many trees in this {{park}}.

senses.en: a thin thing that you use to write with

examples.en: I write my name with a black {{pen}}.
May I use your {{pen}}, please?

senses.en: a thin thing made of wood that you use to write or draw

examples.en: She draws a picture with a {{pencil}}.
My {{pencil}} is too short now.

senses.en: a drawing or an image of someone or something

examples.en: I drew a {{picture}} of my family.
There are many {{pictures}} in this book.

senses.en: a fat pink farm animal with a short tail

examples.en: The {{pig}} is sleeping in the mud.
A baby {{pig}} is very small and pink.

senses.en: to do something fun with toys or with friends

examples.en: The children are {{playing}} in the park.
Do you want to {{play}} with me today?

senses.en: to take part in a game or a sport

examples.en: Let's {{play}} soccer with my friends after school.
They {{play}} basketball together every weekend.

senses.en: to make music with a piano, a drum, or a guitar

examples.en: He can {{play}} the piano very well.

senses.note: 악기 이름 앞에는 the를 써요: play the piano

senses.en: a small soft animal with long ears that can jump

examples.en: The white {{rabbit}} has very long ears.
A {{rabbit}} can jump high and run fast.
examples.ko: 토끼는 높이 뛰고 빨리 달릴 수 있어요.

senses.en: water that falls from the sky in small drops

examples.en: The {{rain}} fell all day long today.
We can not play outside in the {{rain}}.
examples.ko: 비가 와서 우리는 밖에서 놀 수 없어요.

senses.en: to look at words and understand what they mean

examples.en: I like to {{read}} books about animals.
examples.ko: 나는 동물에 관한 책 읽는 걸 좋아해요.

examples.en: She {{read}} the story to her little brother.

senses.en: having the colour of blood or a tomato

examples.en: She is wearing a {{red}} hat.
I like the {{red}} flowers best.

senses.en: the small white seeds that many people eat every day

examples.en: We eat {{rice}} with almost every meal.
examples.ko: 우리는 거의 매 끼니 밥을 먹어요.

examples.en: She cooked warm {{rice}} for our dinner.

senses.en: a long line of water that moves across the land

examples.en: Many fish live in this {{river}}.
We walked along the {{river}} together.

senses.en: one part inside a house with its own walls

examples.en: My {{room}} has a big window.
Please clean your {{room}} before dinner.

senses.en: to move very quickly on your feet

examples.en: I can {{run}} faster than my brother.
examples.ko: 나는 우리 형보다 빨리 달릴 수 있어요.

examples.en: She {{ran}} to the bus stop.

senses.en: feeling bad because something is not nice

examples.en: He was {{sad}} when his dog was sick.
The {{sad}} girl began to cry.

senses.en: a place where children go to learn

examples.en: I go to {{school}} with my friends.
Our {{school}} is close to my house.

senses.en: the very big area of salt water on the earth

examples.en: We swam in the blue {{sea}}.
Many kinds of fish live in the {{sea}}.

senses.en: a thing that you wear on your foot

examples.en: My new {{shoes}} are white and clean.
Please take off your {{shoes}} inside.

senses.en: a place where you buy things with money

examples.en: My mother went to the {{shop}} to buy milk.
examples.ko: 우리 엄마는 우유를 사러 가게에 갔어요.

examples.en: There is a small {{shop}} near my house.
examples.ko: 우리 집 근처에 작은 가게가 있어요.

senses.en: not long, or not tall

examples.en: My hair is very {{short}} now.
He is {{short}}, so he sits at the front.

senses.en: to make music with your voice

examples.en: We {{sing}} a happy song in class.
examples.ko: 우리는 수업 시간에 즐거운 노래를 불러요.

examples.en: A bird {{sang}} outside my window.

senses.en: a girl who has the same mother and father as you

examples.en: My {{sister}} is two years older than me.
examples.ko: 우리 언니는 나보다 두 살 많아요.

examples.en: I play with my little {{sister}} every day.

senses.en: to rest on the lower part of your body

examples.en: Please {{sit}} down on the floor.
The cat {{sat}} on the warm chair.

senses.en: the wide open space high above your head

examples.en: The {{sky}} is blue on a sunny day.
Many stars shine in the night {{sky}}.

senses.en: to close your eyes and rest your body at night

examples.en: I {{sleep}} for eight hours every night.
examples.ko: 나는 매일 밤 여덟 시간 자요.

examples.en: The baby {{slept}} for the whole afternoon.

senses.en: not moving with much speed

examples.en: A turtle is a very {{slow}} animal.
The bus was {{slow}} because of the rain.

senses.en: little in size

examples.en: A mouse is a {{small}} animal.
She lives in a {{small}} house near us.
examples.ko: 그녀는 우리 근처 작은 집에 살아요.

senses.en: soft white drops that fall from the sky when it is cold

examples.en: The children play in the white {{snow}}.
We make a snowman when it {{snows}}.

senses.en: a small bright light that you see in the night sky

examples.en: I can see a bright {{star}} tonight.
There are many {{stars}} in the night sky.

senses.en: the very bright star that gives us light in the day

examples.en: The {{sun}} is very bright this morning.
Plants need water and {{sun}} to grow.

senses.en: a thing with a flat top and legs that you put things on

examples.en: We eat dinner at the {{table}}.
Please put the books on the {{table}}.

senses.en: a person who helps children learn

examples.en: Our {{teacher}} is very kind to us.
The {{teacher}} wrote the words on the board.

senses.en: a big wild animal like a large cat with black lines

examples.en: The {{tiger}} sleeps under a tree all day.
examples.ko: 호랑이는 하루 종일 나무 밑에서 자요.

examples.en: A {{tiger}} can run very fast to catch food.
examples.ko: 호랑이는 먹이를 잡으려고 아주 빨리 달려요.

senses.en: a thing that children play with

examples.en: The baby is playing with a soft {{toy}}.
Please put your {{toys}} in the box.

senses.en: a long line of cars that moves on metal lines

examples.en: We took a {{train}} to the mountain.
The {{train}} is very fast and long.

senses.en: a tall plant with a hard brown body and many leaves

examples.en: A big {{tree}} grows behind our house.
examples.ko: 우리 집 뒤에 큰 나무가 자라요.

examples.en: Many {{trees}} grow near the river.

senses.en: to move on your feet from one place to another

examples.en: I {{walk}} to school every morning.
We {{walked}} along the river together.

senses.en: the clear thing that falls as rain and that we drink

examples.en: Please give me a glass of {{water}}.
Fish live in the {{water}} of the river.

senses.note: 셀 수 없는 명사예요. 'a glass of water'라고 해요.

senses.en: having the colour of snow or milk

examples.en: The falling snow is soft and {{white}}.
She wore a {{white}} dress to school.
examples.ko: 그녀는 하얀 원피스를 입고 학교에 갔어요.

senses.en: air that moves fast outside

examples.en: The {{wind}} is very strong today.
The {{wind}} blew my hat away.

senses.en: the glass part of a wall that you open for air and light

examples.en: Please open the {{window}} to let in air.
I can see the moon through my {{window}}.
examples.ko: 나는 창문으로 달을 볼 수 있어요.

senses.en: to make words on paper with a pen

examples.en: Please {{write}} your name on the paper.
He {{wrote}} a letter to his friend.

senses.en: a time of twelve months

examples.en: My little sister is nine {{years}} old.
We visit the sea every {{year}}.

senses.en: having the colour of the sun or a banana

examples.en: The {{yellow}} flowers are very pretty.
A duck has a {{yellow}} mouth.
